thesis: Stripe expressed preliminary acquisition interest in PayPal in late February 2026 causing a ~7% stock pop, but PayPal is reportedly not actively seeking a sale and no deal has materialized as of mid-March.
method: Weighted search-snippet signals: strong initial buy-side signal (Bloomberg/CNBC) discounted by subsequent Semafor report that PayPal is not seeking a sale and no further deal progress in 4 weeks.

evidence.signal: Bloomberg reported Stripe is considering acquiring all or parts of PayPal; stock surged ~7%
Semafor report: PayPal may not be actively seeking a sale, dampening deal speculation
PayPal remains independent as of March 18; Stripe interest described as 'preliminary' with no deal announced
